metadata.name: Put a Received Shipment into an Inspection Hold

description: A shipment of a critical component has arrived, but it requires quality inspection before it can be used in production.

nodes.task_description: Log the receipt of the shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent records the receipt of the goods from the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Change the inventory status of the received goods to 'Quality Inspection' or 'On Hold'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the status, making the inventory unavailable for production use.

nodes.task_description: Notify the quality assurance department that the shipment is ready for inspection.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a notification to the QA team with the PO and part details.
